title: Dutch Foods
description: Adds classic dutch food items like stamppot and rookworst to the game, with many more to come.
body:
# Dutch Foods
This mod adds classic dutch food items to the game, such as different stamppot (dishes with mashed potato) varients with rookworst (smoked sausage).

There's much more to come in the future.

![Items as of version 0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8732cdb946cb3e84bb2beeeecd973dc0833b7188.png)
### Items
-Andijvie (Crop, seed obtainable by destroying short grass)

-Boerenkool (Crop, seed obtainable by destroying short grass)

-Rookworst (Craftable raw, cook in furnace)

-Andijviestamppot (Craftable, also variant with bacon)

-Boerenkoolstamppot (Craftable, also variants with rookworst and bacon)

-Hutspot (Craftable, also variant with rookworst)

-Hagelslag (Craftable)

-Vlokken (Craftable)

-Apple pie (Craftable)

-Herring (Currently unobtainable)

-Pancake (Cook pancake batter in furnace, also with powdered sugar)

-Poffertjes (Put pancake batter in a crafting recipe to get batter, can cook in furnace, also with powdered sugar)

-Biscuit with muisjes (Craftable with food dye for either pink or blue muisjes)

-Fries with mayo and Tigo's fries (Craftable)

You can find most items in villages in the plains biome or specific village structures in other biomes with a low spawn rate.

### Dependencies
Fabric API

**Recommended:** JEI (or alternative) to view crafting recipes

### Future plans
More stamppot varients, a placeable apple pie (like a minecraft cake). 
Snert (Pea soup)

If you have any suggestions, quesions or problems please let me know on twitter: [@Didierman95](https://x.com/Didierman95)
